description_long: This restaurant is a multi-story urban building with a modern glass facade on one side and a more traditional, brown and white exterior on the other. The ground floor features a street-facing storefront with a striped awning, signage in Japanese, and a small outdoor area with a bicycle and vending machine. The upper levels include a large, angled glass section and rooftop signage with bold blue and white Japanese characters. Utility poles, wires, and rooftop piping add to the urban atmosphere, while the rear and side facades are simpler, with windows and some service doors. The building is set on a paved corner lot, with trash bins and cardboard boxes visible at the back.
description: A modern urban restaurant with a glass facade, Japanese signage, and a street-level storefront featuring an awning and outdoor details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, striped awning, Japanese signage, vending machine, bicycle, and rooftop sign.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the glass facade, upper windows, rooftop piping, and utility poles with wires.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain wall, rooftop structure, and utility pole, with minimal architectural detail.
description_view_3: Back/side view highlights the glass facade, trash bins, cardboard boxes, and the building's angular shape.
attribute_signage: Large rooftop sign with Japanese text in blue and white, smaller hanging sign above the entrance, and a fabric banner with Japanese characters above the awning.
attribute_facade_design: The facade combines a modern glass curtain wall with a traditional brown and white storefront. The ground level features a striped awning, signage, and a vending machine, while the upper levels have large windows and rooftop signage. Urban elements like utility poles, wires, and rooftop piping add to the contemporary city feel.
